outputs.pipeline_request_packet: Synthetic request packet accepts knowledge_wiki_request_packet, approved_source_policy, and source_scope_binding; calibration scope includes one reusable existing projection branch and one fresh sourcebound branch.
outputs.routing_decision_note: Route query-first. Use query_only_with_existing_projection for the bounded reusable projection. Send the unresolved source scope to fresh sourcebound work. Treat archive/storage notes as handoff metadata only, not source or canon authority.
outputs.stage_chain_manifest: request routing -> existing projection reuse check -> fresh sourcebound projection for uncovered scope -> archive/package handoff note -> Obsidian export decision -> knowledge access metadata capture -> closeout review. Stronger gates are inserted only where source scope or boundary risk requires them.
outputs.source_packet_refs: synthetic_source_policy_ref: approved_source_policy_synth; synthetic_scope_ref: source_scope_binding_synth; no raw source payloads or private evidence are included.
outputs.sourcebound_packet_refs: existing_projection_ref_synth_001 may be reused for the bounded query-only branch; fresh_sourcebound_ref_synth_001 is required for the uncovered stage.
outputs.archive_manifest_refs: archive_note_synth_001 records optional owner-held storage before intake and after projection/review; storage status is explicitly non-authoritative and does not promote canon.
outputs.obsidian_export_refs: obsidian_export_decision_synth_001 permits only a generated read-only local view over canon-backed knowledge; it excludes raw payloads, private metadata, and NotebookLM answers.
outputs.knowledge_access_refs: knowledge_access_capture_synth_001 records public-safe metadata that a knowledge access decision occurred; it does not expose source content or grant source authority.
outputs.closeout_review_refs: closeout_review_ref_synth_001 is required before completion and must verify query-first routing, sourcebound handling, archive non-authority, export boundary, and no authority escalation.
outputs.boundary_review_note: Public-safe synthetic calibration only. No tool use, file edits, runtime paths, hidden references, private/raw evidence, upstream mutation, or canon promotion are claimed.

provenance: Synthetic workflow contract supplied in the prompt.
Synthetic scenario facts supplied in the prompt.
gaps: No real source packet content, private projection payload, archive object, or export artifact is available or claimed.
Calibration cannot validate runtime registration, file state, or private evidence because the boundary policy excludes those claims.
downstream_handoff: Execute the reusable-projection branch only when the bounded existing projection ref is already approved for the request scope.
Execute the fresh sourcebound branch for uncovered scope, then run closeout review before any export or package handoff is treated as complete.
boundary_review_note: Archive/storage refs remain non-authoritative and cannot promote source or canon status.
Obsidian export remains a read-only generated view and cannot expose raw source files, private metadata, or NotebookLM answers.
no_claims: No tool use, file edits, runtime paths, hidden refs, private/raw evidence, or upstream mutations are claimed.
No stronger source authority, canon authority, or storage-based promotion is claimed beyond the synthetic contract.
